formula_brief: ((((2.21 * rank(correlation((close - open), delay(volume, 1), 15))) + (0.7 * rank((open - close)))) + (0.73 * rank(Ts_Rank(delay((-1 * returns), 6), 5)))) + rank(abs(correlation(vwap, adv20, 6)))) + (0.6 * rank((((sum(close, 200) / 200) - open) * (close - open)))))
code:
def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])
    
    # Component 1: 2.21 * rank(correlation((close - open), delay(volume, 1), 15))
    close_open = pl.col('close') - pl.col('open')
    delayed_vol = delay(pl.col('volume'), periods=1)
    corr1 = correlation(close_open, delayed_vol, window=15)
    comp1 = 2.21 * rank(corr1).over('date')
    
    # Component 2: 0.7 * rank((open - close))
    comp2 = 0.7 * rank(pl.col('open') - pl.col('close')).over('date')
    
    # Component 3: 0.73 * rank(Ts_Rank(delay((-1 * returns), 6), 5))
    neg_returns = -1 * pl.col('returns')
    delayed_neg_ret = delay(neg_returns, periods=6)
    ts_rank_val = ts_rank(delayed_neg_ret, window=5)
    comp3 = 0.73 * rank(ts_rank_val).over('date')
    
    # Component 4: rank(abs(correlation(vwap, adv20, 6)))
    adv20 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=20)
    corr4 = correlation(pl.col('vwap'), adv20, window=6)
    comp4 = rank(corr4.abs()).over('date')
    
    # Component 5: 0.6 * rank((((sum(close, 200) / 200) - open) * (close - open)))
    sum_close_200 = rolling_sum(pl.col('close'), window=200)
    inner5 = ((sum_close_200 / 200) - pl.col('open')) * (pl.col('close') - pl.col('open'))
    comp5 = 0.6 * rank(inner5).over('date')
    
    # Sum all components
    factor = comp1 + comp2 + comp3 + comp4 + comp5
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
